expectations.text: Response provides the complete YAML metadata block with all required fields: author, version, category, origin, homepage, author-github
expectations.evidence: Response shows full YAML block including: 'author: Jamie Hill (OverKill Hill P³)', 'version: "1.1.0"', 'category: universal', 'origin: okhp3/skillz', 'homepage: https://overkillhill.com', 'author-github: https://github.com/OKHP3' -- all six required fields present and correctly formatted.

expectations.text: Response provides the exact header line format: '**OverKill Hill P³** · [overkillhill.com](...) · [github.com/OKHP3](...)'
expectations.evidence: Response provides exactly: '**OverKill Hill P³** · [overkillhill.com](https://overkillhill.com) · [github.com/OKHP3](https://github.com/OKHP3)' -- exact match including middle-dot separators.

expectations.text: Response provides the exact About footer with all three lines: 'Built by...', 'Published at...', 'Part of the OKHP3/skillz...'
expectations.evidence: Response provides all three lines: 'Built by [Jamie Hill](https://overkillhill.com) · [OverKill Hill P³](https://overkillhill.com)', 'Published at [github.com/OKHP3](https://github.com/OKHP3)', 'Part of the [OKHP3/skillz](https://github.com/OKHP3/skillz) Agent Skill library.' -- exact match.

expectations.text: Response specifies the version bump rule: bumping from 1.0.0 to 1.1.0 (minor) for brand attribution as a structural change
expectations.evidence: Response states: 'Note: The version is set to 1.1.0 because adding brand attribution to an existing skill is considered a structural change.' -- correct rule, correct version target.
